---
name: Security control gap
about: Report a missing or untested security control
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
---

## Control description

Which security invariant or control is missing or insufficient?

Reference [docs/defensive-controls.md](../../docs/defensive-controls.md) or [PROJECT_DOCTRINE.md](../../PROJECT_DOCTRINE.md) if applicable.

## Threat or misuse scenario

Describe the concern in defensive terms. Do not include exploit instructions, jailbreak prompts, or third-party target testing.

## Current behavior

What does the control plane do today?

## Expected behavior

What should the broker, policy, filter, or audit layer do?

## Test plan

How should this be proven? Every security claim requires positive and negative tests.

## Safe reproduction

Describe authorized local lab steps only. No real shell execution from model output, no live external systems.
